scope: Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, and support for basic CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) on notes. Notes must be persisted to disk or another storage mechanism. Implement keyboard shortcuts for common actions such as creating, editing, saving, and removing notes.

tasks.title: Implement note selection and display in MainApp
tasks.description: Add functionality to select a note from the sidebar and display its content in the editor pane. Implement on_sidebar_click() method to handle clicks on ListWidget items, which should update the Static widget with selected note's content. Ensure that clicking 'New Note' adds an empty note to the list and focuses the editor for input. Tests: test selecting a note updates Static with correct content, test adding new note creates empty entry in sidebar.

tasks.title: Implement keyboard shortcuts for common actions
tasks.description: Override the on_key() method to handle specific key events. Implement shortcuts: 'n' for new note, 's' for save current note, 'd' for delete selected note, and 'q' to quit application. Ensure that each shortcut triggers appropriate methods in NoteManager or MainApp. Tests: test pressing 'n' adds a new empty note, test pressing 's' saves changes to disk, test pressing 'd' removes selected note from list.

task_summaries: ✗ task_3: Implement note selection and display in MainApp (3 iter)
✗ task_4: Implement keyboard shortcuts for common actions (3 iter)
